name: idB
haskell_ir: (module (def idB (const forall{p}.p->p) (lam (b (const p_aJI)) (var b))))
lean_src: def idB (b : Bool) : Bool := b

name: notB
haskell_ir: (module (def notB (const Bool->Bool) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var b) (alt (pcon False ()) (const True)) (alt (pcon True ()) (const False))))))
lean_src: def notB (b : Bool) : Bool := match b with | true => false | false => true

name: constTrue
haskell_ir: (module (def constTrue (const forall{p}.p->Bool) (lam (b (const p_aHz)) (const True))))
lean_src: def constTrue (b : Bool) : Bool := true

name: constFalse
haskell_ir: (module (def constFalse (const forall{p}.p->Bool) (lam (b (const p_aHm)) (const False))))
lean_src: def constFalse (b : Bool) : Bool := false

name: andB
haskell_ir: (module (def andB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon False ()) (const False)) (alt (pcon True ()) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def andB (a b : Bool) : Bool := match a with | true => b | false => false

name: orB
haskell_ir: (module (def orB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon False ()) (var b)) (alt (pcon True ()) (const True)))))))
lean_src: def orB (a b : Bool) : Bool := match a with | true => true | false => b

name: nandB
haskell_ir: (module (def nandB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (app (var notB) (app (app (var andB) (var a)) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def nandB (a b : Bool) : Bool := notB (andB a b)

name: norB
haskell_ir: (module (def norB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (app (var notB) (app (app (var orB) (var a)) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def norB (a b : Bool) : Bool := notB (orB a b)

name: xorB
haskell_ir: (module (def xorB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon False ()) (var b)) (alt (pcon True ()) (app (var notB) (var b))))))))
lean_src: def xorB (a b : Bool) : Bool := match a with | true => notB b | false => b

name: implyB
haskell_ir: (module (def implyB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon False ()) (const True)) (alt (pcon True ()) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def implyB (a b : Bool) : Bool := match a with | true => b | false => true

name: nimplyB
haskell_ir: (module (def nimplyB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (app (app (var andB) (var a)) (app (var notB) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def nimplyB (a b : Bool) : Bool := andB a (notB b)

name: eqB
haskell_ir: (module (def eqB (const Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon False ()) (app (var notB) (var b))) (alt (pcon True ()) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def eqB (a b : Bool) : Bool := match a with | true => b | false => notB b

name: and3
haskell_ir: (module (def and3 (const Bool->Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (lam (c (const Bool)) (app (app (var andB) (var a)) (app (app (var andB) (var b)) (var c))))))))
lean_src: def and3 (a b c : Bool) : Bool := andB a (andB b c)

name: or3
haskell_ir: (module (def or3 (const Bool->Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (lam (c (const Bool)) (app (app (var orB) (var a)) (app (app (var orB) (var b)) (var c))))))))
lean_src: def or3 (a b c : Bool) : Bool := orB a (orB b c)

name: xor3
haskell_ir: (module (def xor3 (const Bool->Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (lam (c (const Bool)) (app (app (var xorB) (var a)) (app (app (var xorB) (var b)) (var c))))))))
lean_src: def xor3 (a b c : Bool) : Bool := xorB a (xorB b c)

name: majority3
haskell_ir: (module (def majority3 (const Bool->Bool->Bool->Bool) (lam (a (const Bool)) (lam (b (const Bool)) (lam (c (const Bool)) (app (app (var orB) (app (app (var andB) (var a)) (var b))) (app (app (var orB) (app (app (var andB) (var a)) (var c))) (app (app (var andB) (var b)) (var c)))))))))
lean_src: def majority3 (a b c : Bool) : Bool := orB (andB a b) (orB (andB a c) (andB b c))

name: predn

name: add
haskell_ir: (module (def add (const Nat->Nat->Nat) (let (add (const Nat->Nat->Nat) (lam (a (const Nat)) (lam (b (const Nat)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon Zero ()) (var b)) (alt (pcon Succ (m)) (app (const Succ) (app (app (var add) (var m)) (var b)))))))) (var add))))
lean_src: def add (a b : MyNat) : MyNat := match a with | MyNat.zero => b | MyNat.succ m => MyNat.succ (add m b)

name: mul
haskell_ir: (module (def mul (const Nat->Nat->Nat) (let (mul (const Nat->Nat->Nat) (lam (a (const Nat)) (lam (b (const Nat)) (case (var a) (alt (pcon Zero ()) (const Zero)) (alt (pcon Succ (m)) (app (app (var add) (var b)) (app (app (var mul) (var m)) (var b)))))))) (var mul))))
lean_src: def mul (a b : MyNat) : MyNat := match a with | MyNat.zero => MyNat.zero | MyNat.succ m => add b (mul m b)

name: double
haskell_ir: (module (def double (const Nat->Nat) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (app (var add) (var n)) (var n)))))
lean_src: def double (n : MyNat) : MyNat := add n n

name: triple
haskell_ir: (module (def triple (const Nat->Nat) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (app (var add) (var n)) (app (app (var add) (var n)) (var n))))))
lean_src: def triple (n : MyNat) : MyNat := add n (add n n)

name: quad
haskell_ir: (module (def quad (const Nat->Nat) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (var double) (app (var double) (var n))))))
lean_src: def quad (n : MyNat) : MyNat := double (double n)

lean_src: def addFour (a b c d : MyNat) : MyNat := add (add a b) (add c d)

name: square
haskell_ir: (module (def square (const Nat->Nat) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (app (var mul) (var n)) (var n)))))

name: cube
haskell_ir: (module (def cube (const Nat->Nat) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (app (var mul) (var n)) (app (app (var mul) (var n)) (var n))))))

name: mulThree

lean_src: def addMul (a b : MyNat) : MyNat := add a (mul a b)

name: sumSquares
haskell_ir: (module (def sumSquares (const Nat->Nat->Nat) (lam (a (const Nat)) (lam (b (const Nat)) (app (app (var add) (app (var square) (var a))) (app (var square) (var b)))))))
lean_src: def sumSquares (a b : MyNat) : MyNat := add (square a) (square b)

name: isZero
haskell_ir: (module (def isZero (const Nat->Bool) (lam (n (const Nat)) (case (var n) (alt (pcon Zero ()) (const True)) (alt (pcon Succ (m)) (const False))))))
lean_src: def isZero (n : MyNat) : Bool := match n with | MyNat.zero => true | MyNat.succ m => false

name: notZero
haskell_ir: (module (def notZero (const Nat->Bool) (lam (n (const Nat)) (app (var notB) (app (var isZero) (var n))))))
lean_src: def notZero (n : MyNat) : Bool := notB (isZero n)

name: isOne
haskell_ir: (module (def isOne (const Nat->Bool) (lam (n (const Nat)) (case (var n) (alt (pcon Zero ()) (const False)) (alt (pcon Succ (m)) (app (var isZero) (var m)))))))
lean_src: def isOne (n : MyNat) : Bool := match n with | MyNat.zero => false | MyNat.succ m => isZero m

name: isTwo
haskell_ir: (module (def isTwo (const Nat->Bool) (lam (n (const Nat)) (case (var n) (alt (pcon Zero ()) (const False)) (alt (pcon Succ (m)) (app (var isOne) (var m)))))))
lean_src: def isTwo (n : MyNat) : Bool := match n with | MyNat.zero => false | MyNat.succ m => isOne m
